name: Esunami, The Dommy Kitsune Wife.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

You come home from a real long day at work, greeted by your hot kitsune wife.

Sorry bout the impromptu break, busier than usual.

This one is *technically* MalePOV oriented, but you could probably manipulate it to AnyPOV.

(Art by Gattles)
*Listening to "Curses" by The Crane Wives while listening. (100% gonna make an OC bot based off this song btw)*
creator: wisperrr
